findings.title: AI Agent Traps — Google DeepMind Maps Web Attacks Against Visiting AI Agents
findings.affected_technology: AI browsing agents (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Claude Code-style tools)
findings.summary: Google DeepMind researchers published a taxonomy of web-based attacks against visiting AI agents, demonstrating prompt injection, tool-abuse and data-exfiltration primitives that let malicious sites hijack an agent's workflow.

findings.title: LiteLLM Supply Chain Attack Turns Developer Machines Into Credential Vaults
findings.summary: TeamPCP threat actor compromised LiteLLM — a widely deployed AI proxy downloaded millions of times — harvesting plaintext API keys, cloud tokens and local secrets from developer workstations and CI runners.

findings.title: European Commission Confirms 300GB Breach Linked to Trivy Supply Chain Compromise
findings.summary: The European Commission confirmed attackers stole over 300GB of data including PII from its AWS environment via the previously disclosed Trivy supply chain compromise, demonstrating real-world enterprise impact.

findings.title: North Korean Axios-Linked Actor Targets High-Profile Node.js Maintainers
findings.summary: The DPRK cluster behind the Axios npm supply chain attack is now running targeted social-engineering campaigns against additional high-profile Node.js maintainers, signaling an expanding supply-chain offensive.

noted.summary: Disgruntled researcher 'Chaotic Eclipse' publicly leaked a working local privilege escalation zero-day exploit on GitHub after MSRC handling dispute; out of primary scope but watch for remote chaining.

University of Toronto demonstrated Rowhammer-based GPU page table corruption giving unprivileged CUDA kernels arbitrary GPU memory access and CPU-side privilege escalation, to be presented at IEEE S&P April 13.
Check Point reports Iran-nexus actor conducted three-wave password spraying campaign against 300+ Israeli and 25+ UAE M365 tenants on March 3/13/23, 2026.
Public buffer overflow PoC published on GitHub for PJSIP, affecting VoIP stacks widely embedded in communications platforms.
Path traversal via symlink extract enabling arbitrary file overwrite; PoC published on GitHub with detailed analysis.
